commands.title: Summon Lightning Bolt
commands.description:
Calls down a bolt of pure energy from the heavens.

Learning Points:
• Deals fire damage and 5 HP direct damage
• Can transform Creepers into Charged Creepers
• Can transform Pigs into Zoglins (Java) or Piglins (Bedrock context)
commands.syntaxBreakdown:
1. /summon: Entity creation protocol.
2. lightning_bolt: The entity ID code.
3. ~ ~ ~: Relative coordinate markers (X, Y, Z).
commands.tip: 😂 Tip: Use '/execute at @p run summon lightning_bolt' to repeatedly strike a friend!

commands.title: Dragon Growl
commands.description:
Ghostly audio manifestation of the end boss.

Learning Points:
• Global audio broadcast
• Master channel bypasses volume settings usually
• Perfect for jump scares
commands.syntaxBreakdown:
1. /playsound: Audio trigger function.
2. entity.ender_dragon.growl: Precise sound file path.
3. master: The audio channel (master/ambient/etc).
4. @a: Broadcast targets (All).
commands.tip: Best used while your friends are mining in a dark cave! 🦇

commands.title: Screen Title Hack
commands.description:
Visual UI override for cinematic moments.

Learning Points:
• Large text centered on display
• Uses JSON formatting for styles/colors
• Requires @a for server-wide announcements
commands.syntaxBreakdown:
1. /title: UI layer override.
2. @a: Target spectrum (all players).
3. title: The specific UI slot (title/subtitle/actionbar).
4. {"text":"..."}: JSON object containing the string.
commands.tip: Perfect for setting up minigames or custom server lobbies.

commands.title: Summon TNT
commands.description: Instantly summons a primed TNT block at your position.

commands.title: Summon Dragon
commands.description: Summons the Ender Dragon in the Overworld! Chaos guaranteed.

commands.title: Kill All Mobs
commands.description: Wipes out every entity EXCEPT players.

commands.title: Super Speed
commands.description: Gives max speed with invisible particles.

commands.title: Super Haste
commands.description: Break blocks instantly like they are paper.

commands.title: Super Jump
commands.description: Jump incredibly high without taking fall damage (usually).

commands.title: Invisible
commands.description: Become completely hidden from mobs and players.

commands.title: Lightning Bolt
commands.description: Force a lightning strike at your coordinates.

commands.title: TNT Rain
commands.description: Rains TNT down on every player! Ultimate chaos.

commands.title: Lightning Trail
commands.description: Follows every player with a lightning strike.
